name: @u1f992/kvadrat

scripts.build:asbuild:debug: asc assembly/index.ts --target debug && shx cp -r src/assembly dist/
scripts.build:asbuild:release: asc assembly/index.ts --target release && shx cp -r src/assembly dist/
scripts.build: npm run build:version && npm run format && npm run build:asbuild:release && tsc

author: Koutaro Mukai
description: Vectorizes bitmap images by converting each pixel into polygons and merging regions with the same color.
